top_signals.title: Kenya Retains Benchmark Interest Rate for Second Time
top_signals.summary: Kenya’s central bank left its benchmark interest rate unchanged for the second time in a row, as it monitors the impact of the ongoing conflict in Iran on the economy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Exclusive: Emirates to offer incentives, safety assurances as Iran war hits travel - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Exclusive: Emirates to offer incentives, safety assurances as Iran war hits travel  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil prices fall nearly 4% after U.S. Energy Secretary says Hormuz ship traffic is increasing
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump has repeatedly said a deal with Tehran to reopen Hormuz is close, but such an agreement still has not materialized.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Live updates: bitcoin drifts back to $61,000, putting damper on hope for two straight up days
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: New Shai-Hulud attack trojanizes 19 science-focused PyPI packages
top_signals.summary: Hackers compromised 19 packages on the PyPI, collectively downloaded hundreds of thousands of times, in a new Shai-Hulud supply-chain attack that delivered malware designed to steal developer secrets. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Existing-Home Sales Rise to Fastest Pace of the Year
top_signals.summary: Existing-home sales in the US accelerated to their fastest pace of the year in May, with contract closings rising to an annualized rate of 4.17 million. Mike McKee reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Japanese sailor sets course for around-the-world yacht race
top_signals.summary: If Masatomo Suzuki completes the 2028 Vendee Globe, an event known as "the Everest of the seas," he would become the second Japanese person to achieve the feat.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
